Source URL: https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/FAQs.asp

# Loan Readiness Help via SBDC

## User need
Use when users ask for business loans, SBA loans, lender matching, or how much funding they need. Include FAQ note that SBDC does not lend money but can help with readiness and documentation.

## BOSS routing output
Recommended Resource:
Reason for Routing:
Next Best Action:
Human Referral Assessment:
Guardrails:

## Suggested next question
"What is the specific decision you need help making next?"
